name: Broadsheet
description: Cream paper background, ink-black text, Playfair Display serif. Editorial newspaper/journalism feel. No colour accent — ink only.

typography.note: No coloured accents — use ink black for everything. Use thin horizontal rules (1px #1c1c1c) as decorative dividers. All-caps labels with wide letter-spacing (8px) feel like column headers. Use accentAlt (#8b0000) sparingly for breaking-news urgency only.

css.hed: font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-weight:900; font-size:120px; color:#1c1c1c; line-height:1.05;
css.capText: font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:34px; font-weight:400; color:#1c1c1c; padding:0 140px; line-height:1.5;
